name: io.github.jhonattan-souza/dotnet-agents-caldav
description: MCP server for CalDAV task management — create, update, complete, and query tasks via CalDAV.

environmentVariables.name: CALDAV_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the CalDAV server (e.g. https://caldav.example.com)

environmentVariables.name: CALDAV_TASK_LISTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of task list hrefs to expose (optional; omit to auto-discover)

environmentVariables.name: CALDAV_DEFAULT_TASK_LIST
environmentVariables.description: Display name of the default task list to use when chat requests omit an explicit list name (optional)

environmentVariables.name: CALDAV_EXPOSE_ADVANCED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to expose advanced href-based tools alongside the chat-safe surface (optional)
